title: Citrusy Crispy Japanese Seitan Stir-fry
description: A post-workout dish featuring a citrusy and crispy seitan stir-fry with dried oregano, ready in under 30 minutes.
instructions: Preheat your wok or frying pan over high heat. Add olive oil and heat until shimmering.
Slice the seitan into thin strips, season with garlic powder, chili flakes (if using), and salt to taste.
Add seitan to the hot pan; stir-fry for about 5 minutes, flipping occasionally until golden brown on all sides.
Drizzle rice wine vinegar over seitan. Add soy sauce, sugar, and oregano. Stir well to combine.
Stir in orange slices. Cover with a lid or tin foil and cook for another minute or until the oranges soften slightly.
Remove from heat and garnish with green onions before serving.
